title: [FIRRTL] Move port directions + names to `firrtl.instance`
body:
The primary contribution of this change is to add port directions
and names to the instance op.  This fixes the issue where we had to
fetch this information from the referenced module, which was not
guaranteed to be thread safe.

The printed form of the instance op is now a hybrid between the HW
instance op and a FIRRTL module, printing the entire "module signature"
at the end. This is quite verbose but needs to be in the IR format
(i.e. every op has to be parsable using only local information).

```mlir
firrtl.instance test @simple(in a: !firrtl.uint<1>, out b: !firrtl.uint<1>)
```
